text:
General, Financial Services, HMT)

From: a) cs

Sent:
To: Nurse, Gwyneth - HMT; JCS - HMT; Lee, Rohan - HMT; JCS
JCS umt; JCS JCS HMT
Cc: Econ
Subject: IMF Springs - Gwyneth Nurse read-outs
Attachments: Macro Research_ Trapped capital and the changing nature of financial shocks.pdf

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Gwyneth and colleagues,

Please see read-outs from your meetings below, with il

and HMA Peter Mandelson. | understand CXO are doing the digital
assets roundtable read-out separately.

Specific actions you agreed to in these meetings:

- Finalising dates for the UK-EU regulatory working group as soon as possible ( we ;
- Inputting ideas to ae for we
- Share info with ial on the UK’s approaches to tax incentives for investing in young

firms, incl. the Enterprise Investment Scheme.

Hope your journey back was smooth and please don’t hesitate to ask if anything else we can support
with by way of follow-ups. Huge thanks to HMT colleagues again (especially JCS) for their
preparatory work for your programme.

Thanks all,
Jcs

Third Party

Third Party

Your meeting with Ambassador Peter Mandelson:

- You updated HMA on UK crypto legislation.
